faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our AI text to video generation service.

items.question: What is an AI text to video generator?
items.answer: An AI text to video generator is a powerful tool that uses artificial intelligence to create video content from simple text descriptions. It analyzes your text prompt and generates dynamic, high-quality videos that bring your words to life.

items.question: What is the best text to video AI generator?
items.answer: DreamOmni combines a fast prompt-to-video workflow with Gemini Omni-style creative guidance, so creators can generate cinematic AI videos online.

items.question: How does text to video AI generation work?
items.answer: Our text to video AI analyzes your written description, understands the context, objects, actions, and styles mentioned, then generates corresponding visual sequences with appropriate motion, lighting, and effects to match your prompt.

items.question: What types of videos can I create with text to video?
items.answer: You can create a wide variety of content including promotional videos, social media content, educational materials, concept visualizations, storytelling videos, and artistic creations. The possibilities are limited only by your imagination.

items.question: Is DreamOmni's text to video generator free?
items.answer: DreamOmni offers free trial credits and paid options for supported AI video generation models.

cta.title: Create Stunning Videos with Only Text Now!
cta.description: Transform your ideas into stunning AI-generated videos with just a simple text prompt. Start creating professional videos in seconds.

aiModelsHero.title: All-in-One AI Text to Video Generator
aiModelsHero.description: DreamOmni is an all-in-one AI text to video generator. Create cinematic videos with prompt control, image references, and supported video models like Veo, Hailuo, Wan, Sora-style alternatives, and Seedance.

aiVideoShowcase.title: Visualize Any Text with Our AI Video Generator
aiVideoShowcase.description: Bring any text to life with our AI video generator! Create engaging videos of any style with just a simple text prompt. Describe your ideas with a few words, and our video AI can visualize it creatively.

examples.prompt: A glass strawberry shatters when sliced with a knife on a wooden board.

examples.alt: Anime rose blooming with dancing petals
examples.prompt: An anime-style rose blooms before a rope bridge, with petals dancing in the air.

examples.alt: Monkey and seagull dancing on moonlit beach
examples.prompt: A monkey and a seagull dance on a moonlit beach under a starry sky.

examples.alt: Monarch butterfly fluttering wings on flowers
examples.prompt: A monarch butterfly flutters its wings on colorful flowers in a sunlit garden.
